markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[To resolve Zoom meeting scheduling issues and set up proper configurations for team meetings.](https://fathom.video/share/vPzL5fNaqtZZzr3a9zE4Lx_5psceYHWz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - Created a separate Chrome profile for "<team@growthx.com>" to manage Zoom meetings
  - [Configured Zoom settings for team account, including disabling waiting room and enabling auto-recording](https://fathom.video/share/vPzL5fNaqtZZzr3a9zE4Lx_5psceYHWz?tab=summary&timestamp=939.0)
  - [Set up alternative hosts (e.g., Jason) for specific meetings to allow necessary controls](https://fathom.video/share/vPzL5fNaqtZZzr3a9zE4Lx_5psceYHWz?tab=summary&timestamp=1892.0)
  - [Connected team's Zoom account to Fathom for automatic recording and internal viewing permissions](https://fathom.video/share/vPzL5fNaqtZZzr3a9zE4Lx_5psceYHWz?tab=summary&timestamp=2146.0)

## Topics

### Chrome Profile Setup

  - Created a new Chrome profile for "<team@growthx.com>"
  - [Logged in using credentials from 1Password and set up two-factor authentication](https://fathom.video/share/vPzL5fNaqtZZzr3a9zE4Lx_5psceYHWz?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [This separate profile allows for easier management of team-specific Zoom meetings](https://fathom.video/share/vPzL5fNaqtZZzr3a9zE4Lx_5psceYHWz?tab=summary&timestamp=1196.0)

### Zoom Meeting Configuration

  - [Disabled waiting room for team meetings](https://fathom.video/share/vPzL5fNaqtZZzr3a9zE4Lx_5psceYHWz?tab=summary&timestamp=948.0)
  - [Enabled auto-recording for all scheduled meetings](https://fathom.video/share/vPzL5fNaqtZZzr3a9zE4Lx_5psceYHWz?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)
  - [Set up alternative hosts (e.g., Jason) for specific meetings](https://fathom.video/share/vPzL5fNaqtZZzr3a9zE4Lx_5psceYHWz?tab=summary&timestamp=1892.0)
  - [Connected team's Zoom account to Fathom for automatic recording](https://fathom.video/share/vPzL5fNaqtZZzr3a9zE4Lx_5psceYHWz?tab=summary&timestamp=2089.0)
  - [Configured Fathom settings:](https://fathom.video/share/vPzL5fNaqtZZzr3a9zE4Lx_5psceYHWz?tab=summary&timestamp=2152.0)
      - [Auto-record in gallery mode](https://fathom.video/share/vPzL5fNaqtZZzr3a9zE4Lx_5psceYHWz?tab=summary&timestamp=2152.0)
      - [Only allow internal viewing of recorded meetings](https://fathom.video/share/vPzL5fNaqtZZzr3a9zE4Lx_5psceYHWz?tab=summary&timestamp=2194.0)

### Meeting Scheduling Process

  - [Create meetings in the team Calendar](https://fathom.video/share/vPzL5fNaqtZZzr3a9zE4Lx_5psceYHWz?tab=summary&timestamp=1253.0)
  - [Add Zoom details within the team profile](https://fathom.video/share/vPzL5fNaqtZZzr3a9zE4Lx_5psceYHWz?tab=summary&timestamp=1211.0)
  - [For existing meetings, edit in Zoom web interface to add alternative hosts](https://fathom.video/share/vPzL5fNaqtZZzr3a9zE4Lx_5psceYHWz?tab=summary&timestamp=1901.0)

### Fathom Integration

  - [Connected team's Zoom account to Fathom](https://fathom.video/share/vPzL5fNaqtZZzr3a9zE4Lx_5psceYHWz?tab=summary&timestamp=2089.0)
  - [Enabled auto-recording for all scheduled meetings](https://fathom.video/share/vPzL5fNaqtZZzr3a9zE4Lx_5psceYHWz?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)
  - [Set permissions for internal viewing only](https://fathom.video/share/vPzL5fNaqtZZzr3a9zE4Lx_5psceYHWz?tab=summary&timestamp=2194.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Use the new team Chrome profile for scheduling Zoom meetings](https://fathom.video/share/vPzL5fNaqtZZzr3a9zE4Lx_5psceYHWz?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)
  - [Add alternative hosts to meetings as needed through the Zoom web interface](https://fathom.video/share/vPzL5fNaqtZZzr3a9zE4Lx_5psceYHWz?tab=summary&timestamp=1901.0)
  - [Monitor the new setup to ensure proper functioning of auto-recording and Fathom integration](https://fathom.video/share/vPzL5fNaqtZZzr3a9zE4Lx_5psceYHWz?tab=summary&timestamp=2235.0)
  - [Communicate the new process to relevant team members for consistent meeting management](https://fathom.video/share/vPzL5fNaqtZZzr3a9zE4Lx_5psceYHWz?tab=summary&timestamp=2290.0)
